uplink.description: IIC mode: onboard SHT temp/humidity + battery + DS18B20 probe (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: Upstream BatV 2.9, TempC_SHT 25.2, Hum_SHT 51.7, TempC1 0 -> battery, air, probeTemperature.

uplink.description: IIC mode: negative SHT temperature, nonzero probe temp (synthetic in-bounds)
3ADC mode (mode 2): SHT temp/humidity, battery from byte 11 (synthetic in-bounds)
uplink._note: mode bits byte6=0x08 -> mode 2. Upstream BatV byte11/10=3.0, TempC_SHT 30 (300/10), Hum_SHT 51.7 (517/10); no DS18B20 probe in 3ADC mode.

uplink.description: IIC mode: humidity channel reports illuminance (humidity field 0) -> air.lightIntensity + warning

warnings: SHT humidity channel reported illuminance; no air.relativeHumidity in this frame

uplink._note: Upstream Illum branch: bytes9/10==0 -> Illum 300; we emit air.lightIntensity and warn that no relativeHumidity is present.
Upstream returns {errors:['unknown FPort']} for any non-2 port; we reject with our own message.
